expected.notes: Form I-9 and E-Verify employee names match exactly; rule i9_everify_name_mismatch must not fire because the comparison status is match not mismatch.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'i9_everify_name_mismatch', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - comparison.i9_everify_employee_name mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
